hero_description: An integrated system to facilitate access to digital services for students and faculty members.
features_subtitle: Everything you need to easily manage training and exams.
feature1_desc: Register online using your national ID with automatic OCR verification.
feature2_desc: Track your information, training and exam schedules, and results in one place.
feature3_desc: If you fail, you can apply to retake the exam and pay directly through the system.
feature4_desc: Obtain a certified digital success certificate from the Supreme Council of Universities.
feature5_desc: Receive alerts via email, WhatsApp, and SMS for all updates.
feature6_desc: You can request a success statement or an officially certified document directly from the system.
